mnemonics: LEE (Learn, Empower, Explain): Sangwon Lee focuses on AI systems that Learn from data, Empower users, and are Explainable.
keyPoints: Sangwon Lee's work emphasizes designing AI that augments and collaborates with human intelligence, rather than replacing it.
His research focuses on making AI systems more understandable, transparent, and accountable to users.
A key goal is to create AI that respects human autonomy and provides meaningful human control over automated decisions.
commonMistakes: Assuming human-centered AI is only about user interface design, ignoring deeper ethical and control aspects.
Confusing explainability (understanding how an AI works) with interpretability (understanding why an AI made a specific decision).
Overlooking the importance of continuous user feedback and adaptation in human-AI collaboration systems.
